blocks.body: Usage examples and common mistakes - a complete overview of the most common mistakes when using the passive voice and practical tips on how to avoid them.

{ "title": "9. The main rules - avoid mistakes!", "items": [ "Always use be + V3 in the passive.", "Do not confuse V2 and V3: broken (not broke), written (not wrote).", "Don't use do/does/did in passive questions.", "by + agent (хто?); with + instrument (чим?).", "У Perfect: has/have been + V3 (не: has done).", "У Continuous: am/is/are being + V3 (не: is writing).", "Check the agreement of be with the subject: is/are, was/were.", "Don't abuse the passive — the active often sounds more natural." ] }
